allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
docs: revise workflow to Spec-Driven Development

Restructure the entire Claude Code configuration around a design-first
methodology where specifications are defined before implementation.

Workflow changes:
- Adopt Spec-Driven Development with 5 phases \(Requirements, Design,
  Implement, Verify, Finalize\)
- Add Reproduce-First \(bugfix\), Safety-Net-First \(refactor\),
  Schema-First \(DB change\) workflows

Agent changes:
- Add frontend-implementer, backend-implementer, tester, e2e-tester
- Remove tdd-guide \(replaced by tester\)
- Rename e2e-runner to e2e-tester

Skill restructuring:
- Rename ts-js-patterns to ts-patterns \(remove JavaScript references\)
- Rename python-testing to python-test-patterns
- Extract ts-test-patterns from generic test-patterns
- Remove tdd-workflow \(methodology integrated into workflow.md\)
- Move language-agnostic test rules to rules/common/testing.md

Documentation:
- Add CLAUDE.md describing the Spec-Driven Development configuration
- Rewrite README.md with methodology, structure, and usage

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
